column1: The results of the stability study (Table 4) indicate that the freeze-dried PLGA-NPs-5
were stable at different temperatures for 1 month. Almost no changes in the mentioned
characteristic parameters for the PLGA-NPs were found stored at 4 ◦C. A slight variation
in particle sizes were noted in the samples store at 37 ◦C, and such changes were non-
signiﬁcant. No obvious change in the particle size was associated with the stabilizer’s
protection effect on the PLGA-NPs shell, which was also reported in the previous short
term stability on drug loaded PLGA-NPs [28,52].
